templates.name: Default
templates.text: Current ticket files are in {{ticketDir}}. Read the files there for context. Do not do anything else.

templates.name: Implement
templates.text:
Current ticket files are in {{ticketDir}}. Read the files there for context. Do not do anything else.

run: git rebase master
/hero2 hero {{ticketSlug}}
/exploratory-testing current branch

templates.name: Merge
templates.text:
Execute strictly in order:

- If there are untracked or uncommitted changes, commit them first
- Squash all changes in the branch into a single commit (the commit message must start with the ticket number and ticket title)
- Run git -C <main-worktree> merge --ff-only <branch> to fast-forward master
- If there are conflicts:
    - Rebase the branch on master
    - Resolve the issues
    - Make all tests pass
    - Run git -C <main-worktree> merge --ff-only <branch> to fast-forward master again

skills.name: Plan
skills.text: /grill-with-docs-k help me creating a detailed product-requirement-document.md in the ticket folder. use /to-prd-k to generate the prd at the end

conflictResolutionPrompt: Resolve all merge conflicts, then run git rebase --continue. Repeat until the rebase completes. Then push to remote and verify with git status that everything is clean. CRITICAL: Do not leave untracked, uncommitted or unpushed files. The goal is to sync the local branch with remote.
